catalyst_record.primary_catalyst: Agent Force 40% repeat bookings from existing customers validating agentic enterprise flywheel; FY guidance raise.
catalyst_record.invalidation: Agent Force adoption slowdown or repeat bookings decline; SaaS sector multiple compression.
catalyst_record.claude_reasoning: CRM's FY guidance was raised (per NLP), with Agent Force showing 40% repeat bookings from existing customers—a high-signal product-market fit indicator. TIER_S PEAD drift on 6-quarter beat streak and Informatica acquisition support multi-quarter narrative. 41% DCF gap and 8% buyback yield provide downside cushion. Grade A despite MARGINAL momentum tier (54.2 score), as guidance raise is a powerful catalyst.

catalyst_record.primary_catalyst: Cloud business surpassing $50B symbolic AI infrastructure inflection; Copilot 10x YoY DAU growth.
catalyst_record.invalidation: Copilot monetization fails to materialize; Cloud capex ROI timeline extends; valuation compresses.
catalyst_record.claude_reasoning: MSFT exhibits elite research convergence (88.5/100, ULTRA-tier with 8 engines), TIER_A options flow, and 8-quarter earnings quality. Cloud hitting $50B and Copilot DAU growth are meaningful product inflection signals. Guidance raised per NLP. However, momentum tier is WATCH (not TIER_A), and valuation unvetted. Grade A for strong fundamental catalysts despite momentum caution.

catalyst_record.invalidation: HAMR qualification delays; exabyte demand softens; customer concentration risk materializes.

Earnings guidance was raised per NLP. 8-quarter PEAD streak and high RS (+93% 60d) validate structural AI data-center tailwinds. Grade A for durability over multiple quarters, though no specific earnings date provided.

catalyst_record.primary_catalyst: Indonesia MOU extending mining rights through 2041; copper supercycle tailwinds from electrification and AI.
secondary_catalysts: Grasberg ramp (60K tpd mid-2026) near-term headwind offset by long-term optionality
catalyst_record.invalidation: Copper price collapse; Indonesia regulatory reversal; Grasberg ramp delays extend beyond H2 2026.
catalyst_record.claude_reasoning: FCX benefits from structural copper demand drivers (electrification, AI data centers) and regulatory clarity (Indonesia MOU through 2041). However, the research flags only 2 engines, low convergence (45.2/100), and a near-term Grasberg ramp shortfall (60K vs 100K tpd). Guidance was withdrawn. Grade B reflects solid macro thesis but brittle near-term execution and thin technical confirmation.

aggressive_basket.philosophy: PUMP-HUNTER MODE with CATALYST-AWARE SIZING. 5-7 names, 5-18% each, ~100% deployment. Sized by sqrt(pump × momentum) × catalyst_grade_mult (A=1.2 / B=1.0 / C=0.8 / D=0.4) × 1.15 if PUMP_CONFIRMED × cluster_modifier. Grade D / no-catalyst names get 60% downsize — naked momentum is speculative. Sector cap 60%. Stops mandatory.

construction_rules.combined_score: sqrt(pump × momentum) × catalyst_grade_mult × 1.15 if PUMP_CONFIRMED × cluster_modifier
